description_long: This is a closed, brown, molded pulp egg carton with a rectangular shape and rounded corners. The carton features a hinged lid with two visible locking tabs at the front, designed to keep the contents secure. On the top surface, there is a bold yellow graphic with the text 'TOMÁS Y LUCI' and a curved underline, giving it a branded appearance. The surface texture is rough and fibrous, typical of recycled paper pulp packaging. The carton appears to be able to hold a standard half-dozen eggs, with six individual compartments inside, though the interior is not visible. The overall look is utilitarian and eco-friendly, suitable for food storage and transport.
description: A brown, molded pulp egg carton with a yellow 'TOMÁS Y LUCI' logo and a rough, fibrous texture. The carton is closed and designed to securely hold eggs.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the locking tabs and the 'TOMÁS Y LUCI' logo clearly on the lid.
description_view_1: Rear-left view with the back edge and hinge area visible, logo partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear-right view highlighting the back and side contours, logo partially visible.
description_view_3: Front-right view with the front edge and locking tabs visible, logo partially visible.
attribute_orientation: resting flat with the lid facing upward
attribute_contextual_placement: Most likely encountered in a kitchen, grocery store, or during food transport, used to store and protect eggs.
attribute_decorative_patterns: yellow printed logo and curved underline
